raw: {"poster_status":"Generated","video_status":"Failed","poster_prompt":"A high‑resolution corporate poster for a Facebook ad targeting large enterprises in the General industry. Central visual: a glowing, semi‑transparent digital globe composed of interconnected circuit lines, symbolizing IoT and global reach. In the foreground, a confident, gender‑neutral business professional stands beside a holographic 3D blueprint of a sustainable factory, highlighted with green energy icons (wind turbine, solar panel). Background features a modern city skyline at sunrise, bathed in soft golden light, with subtle silhouettes of wind turbines and solar farms on the horizon. Color palette: deep navy blue, teal, and vibrant emerald green accents. Lighting: dramatic rim lighting on the figure, ambient glow from the hologram, lens flare from the sunrise. Style: hyper‑realistic photorealism with cinematic depth of field, high contrast, clean composition leaving space for bold headline “Transform Tomorrow” and sub‑text “Digital, Sustainable, Automated”. Include a placeholder logo in the top‑right corner. Dimensions: 1080 × 1080 px, optimized for Facebook feed.","video_prompt":"A 10-second high‑impact cinematic video for a Facebook ad targeting large enterprises in the General industry. Opening: a dynamic rotating digital globe made of glowing circuit lines, slowly zooming out to reveal a world map with bright connection lines pulsing. Cut to a confident, gender‑neutral business professional walking through a futuristic sustainable factory; holographic data overlays show IoT sensors, green energy icons (wind turbine, solar panel) and automation robots moving in sync. The scene transitions with a smooth glide to a sunrise city skyline, golden light reflecting off glass towers, with subtle wind turbines on rooftops. Throughout, vibrant teal and emerald green accents highlight key elements. Lighting: rim lighting on the professional, ambient glow from holograms, lens flares from sunrise. Style: hyper‑realistic, cinematic depth of field, high contrast. End frame: bold white text “Transform Tomorrow” fades in, subtext “Digital, Sustainable, Automated” appears below, and a placeholder logo appears in the top right corner. Upbeat instrumental background music with a rising tempo. Duration: 10 seconds, optimized for Facebook feed."}

tasks_output.target_audience: Large enterprises, mid‑size manufacturers, and technology adopters in the General industry worldwide, especially those focused on digital transformation, sustainability, emerging markets, advanced manufacturing, and service‑based models.
channels: PR and thought leadership in trade publications
content_strategy: Thought‑leadership articles on IoT integration and green tech
Video case studies showcasing advanced automation solutions
Interactive ROI calculators for sustainability investments
Webinars featuring industry experts on digital transformation
Infographics highlighting market growth and opportunities
Customer success stories targeting emerging market expansion
Regular newsletters with industry trends and product updates
tasks_output.budget_estimate: $25‑30 million over 12 months, allocated across media spend, content production, events, and technology platforms.
tasks_output.expected_roi: Projected 3‑5× return on investment within 24 months, driven by increased market share, higher average contract value, and accelerated pipeline velocity.

leads.reason_for_targeting: Leader in digital transformation and IoT integration with a multi‑billion‑dollar budget for sustainability and advanced manufacturing initiatives.
Strong focus on advanced automation, green technologies, and a robust financial capacity to invest in emerging market expansion.
Diverse product portfolio targeting service‑based business models and sustainability solutions, with significant budget for digital transformation projects.

tasks_output.poster_prompt: A high‑resolution corporate poster for a Facebook ad targeting large enterprises in the General industry. Central visual: a glowing, semi‑transparent digital globe composed of interconnected circuit lines, symbolizing IoT and global reach. In the foreground, a confident, gender‑neutral business professional stands beside a holographic 3D blueprint of a sustainable factory, highlighted with green energy icons (wind turbine, solar panel). Background features a modern city skyline at sunrise, bathed in soft golden light, with subtle silhouettes of wind turbines and solar farms on the horizon. Color palette: deep navy blue, teal, and vibrant emerald green accents. Lighting: dramatic rim lighting on the figure, ambient glow from the hologram, lens flare from the sunrise. Style: hyper‑realistic photorealism with cinematic depth of field, high contrast, clean composition leaving space for bold headline “Transform Tomorrow” and sub‑text “Digital, Sustainable, Automated”. Include a placeholder logo in the top‑right corner. Dimensions: 1080 × 1080 px, optimized for Facebook feed.
tasks_output.video_prompt: A 10-second high‑impact cinematic video for a Facebook ad targeting large enterprises in the General industry. Opening: a dynamic rotating digital globe made of glowing circuit lines, slowly zooming out to reveal a world map with bright connection lines pulsing. Cut to a confident, gender‑neutral business professional walking through a futuristic sustainable factory; holographic data overlays show IoT sensors, green energy icons (wind turbine, solar panel) and automation robots moving in sync. The scene transitions with a smooth glide to a sunrise city skyline, golden light reflecting off glass towers, with subtle wind turbines on rooftops. Throughout, vibrant teal and emerald green accents highlight key elements. Lighting: rim lighting on the professional, ambient glow from holograms, lens flares from sunrise. Style: hyper‑realistic, cinematic depth of field, high contrast. End frame: bold white text “Transform Tomorrow” fades in, subtext “Digital, Sustainable, Automated” appears below, and a placeholder logo appears in the top right corner. Upbeat instrumental background music with a rising tempo. Duration: 10 seconds, optimized for Facebook feed.
